compliance.assurance_rationale: NERC CIP-010-4 R1 Configuration change management — PLC firmware change detection is the direct evidence control for the firmware/configuration change-management requirement.
IEC 62443 FR 6.2 Continuous monitoring — firmware change detection feeds the continuous-monitoring Foundational Requirement for control devices.
API RP 1164 3rd edition 6.2.1 Logging and monitoring — firmware change detection is one of the listed pipeline-control-system monitoring controls.
